{{Quote|They now have nine colonies on Ylesia. They are preparing to start another colony on Nyrvona, the other habitable world in the system.|[[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]], about the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]|<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
'''Nyrvona''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cha Raaba system]] of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. Like [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] used it as a quasi-religious [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-processing colony.

==Behind the scenes==
In the real world, Nirvana is a Sanskrit word for "liberation."

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1stm}}
